title: ctenitis jinfoshanensis
intro: Ctenitis jinfoshanensis, also known as Jinshan fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis jinfoshanensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as alleviating symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Ctenitis jinfoshanensis is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
